beta.title: Mnemos dashboard is in beta
beta.description: This cockpit is under active development. Layout, scores, and flows may change between releases.
beta.stable: The CLI and HTML report are the stable surfaces today.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Mnemos doesn't have a page at this URL. Use the cockpit navigation or command palette (Ctrl+K).

unexpected.title: Unexpected application error
unexpected.description: Something went wrong. You can go back, reload, or return to your cockpit.

errors.server: The server returned an unexpected response.

vibe.label: Vibecoder
vibe.lens: Shows business capabilities, journeys, and the clearest next actions first.

ai.label: AI
ai.lens: Highlights DNA, issue exports, context docs, and copy-ready payloads.

coder.label: Coder
coder.lens: Prioritizes architecture, code map, history, and build intelligence.
